faq.question: How much should an average window replacement cost?
faq.answer: In Fremont, Bay Area homeowners typically see about $1,500-$3,000 per window installed for quality vinyl, and more for fiberglass, clad-wood or architectural products. The final number depends on window count, sizes, frame material and access, so Deluxe Windows prices each Fremont project after on-site measurements.
